docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-06-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF SOMKIAT PITAK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KUNG-YUEN CHIU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY HIS OWN INTERPRETER MICHAEL MA WHO IS NOT CERTIFIED. I ADMINISTERED THE INTERPRETER'S OATH TO MICHAEL MA FOR CANTONESE TRANSLATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PITAK, SOMKIAT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHIU, KUNG-YUEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY PITAK, SOMKIAT AS TO DEFENDANT CHIU, KUNG-YUEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 SERVED NOV-30-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIU, KUNG-YUEN
